info.description:
IoC Cognition Fabric Node service — shared memory routing and memory operations proxy.

Internal endpoints only.
info.title: CFN Service API — Internal

get.description: Returns all nodes and edges in the knowledge graph for the given MAS.
get.summary: Fetch knowledge graph for a MAS

post.description: Finds concept nodes nearest to a query embedding vector using HNSW index.

parameters.description: Include raw embedding vectors in results (debug only)
parameters.name: include_embeddings

post.description: Returns concept details for each of the provided concept IDs.

get.description: Returns the neighboring concepts of a given concept in the knowledge graph.

post.description: Returns ordered paths through the knowledge graph between a source and target concept.

put.description: Adds or updates concepts and relations in an existing knowledge graph for a given workspace and MAS.

post.description: Performs vector similarity search over document embeddings stored for a given workspace and MAS.
post.summary: Search shared memory vectors by similarity

parameters.description: Include raw embedding vectors in results (debug only)
parameters.name: include_embeddings

post.description: Onboards the shared memory vector store for a given MAS. The store is scoped per-MAS.
post.summary: Onboards the shared memory vector store.

delete.description: Deletes the shared memory vector store.
delete.summary: Deletes the shared memory vector store.

data.description:
Data contains the extraction payload and its structure depends on Metadata.Format.

Supported formats: "observe-sdk-otel" and "openclaw

1. format = "observe-sdk-otel"
   - Data MUST be a JSON array of ExtractionDataRecord objects.
   - Example:
[
  { TraceId, SpanId, ParentSpanId, SpanName, ServiceName, SpanAttributes, Duration }
]

2. format = "openclaw"
   - Data is an opaque JSON payload.
   - The structure is not interpreted or validated by this service and is processed as-is.

Clients MUST ensure the Data field matches the structure required by the specified Metadata.Format.

metadata.description: Metadata describes the format and interpretation of the payload.

format.description:
Format specifies how the Data field should be interpreted.

Supported values:
- "observe-sdk-otel": Data is a JSON array of ExtractionDataRecord
- "openclaw": Data is an opaque JSON payload

id.description: ID is the unique agent identifier.

name.description: Name is the human-readable agent name.

offer.description:
Offer is the proposed option per issue when Action is "counter_offer".
Shape: {issue_id: option_label}

participant_id.description: ParticipantID is the ID of the participant who made this decision.

offer.description:
Offer is the proposed option per issue when Action is "counter_offer".
Shape: {issue_id: option_label}

participant_id.description: ParticipantID is the ID of the agent replying.

agent_replies.description: AgentReplies contains each agent's reply to the current round.

session_id.description: SessionID is the session identifier from the /start response.

final_result.description:
FinalResult holds the terminal negotiation envelope when Status is
"agreed", "broken", or "timeout".

messages.description:
Messages contains the next round's messages to dispatch to agents.
Present only when Status is "ongoing". Forward these to each agent's
callback endpoint, collect their replies, and submit via /decide again.

round.description: Round is the round number that was just evaluated.

shared_memory.description:
SharedMemory reports the outcome of persisting the agreement to shared
memory. Only present when Status is "agreed".

broken.description: Broken indicates whether a participant explicitly broke off.

final_agreement.description: FinalAgreement is the agreed option per issue, if any.

rounds.description: Rounds contains all SAO rounds in order (1-based).

timedout.description: Timedout indicates whether the SAO exhausted its step budget.

decisions.description: Decisions contains each participant's response to this round's offer.

next_proposer_id.description:
NextProposerID is the ID of the participant who will propose in the next round.
Omitted on the final round.

offer.description: Offer is the proposed option per issue. Shape: {issue_id: option_label}

proposer_id.description: ProposerID is the ID of the participant who made this proposal.

error.description: Error contains a human-readable reason when Persisted is false.

persisted.description: Persisted is true when the agreement was successfully written to shared memory.

agents.description: Agents is the list of participating agents (minimum 2).

content_text.description: ContentText is the negotiation prompt/context used to initialize the session.

n_steps.description:
NSteps is the maximum number of SAO rounds.
If omitted, the service computes a budget from negotiation complexity.

session_id.description: SessionID is the client-provided session identifier.

current_round.description: CurrentRound is the first offer in the trace (SSTP envelope path only).

issues.description: Issues is the list of negotiable issues discovered from content_text.

messages.description:
Messages contains the first round's messages to dispatch to agents.
Forward each message to the corresponding agent's callback endpoint,
collect their replies, and submit via /decide.

n_steps.description: NSteps is the SAO round budget for this session.

options_per_issue.description: OptionsPerIssue lists the candidate options for each issue.

round.description: Round is the current round number (1-based).

total_rounds.description: TotalRounds is the total SAO rounds in the pre-computed trace (SSTP envelope path only).

trace.description: Trace is the complete pre-computed SAO trace (SSTP envelope path only).

payload.description: Payload contains the extraction metadata and the raw data to be processed. The structure of the payload data is defined by Payload.Metadata.Format

request_id.description: ID of the request, optional. If not provided, a random UUID is used to represent the request

graph_store_message.description: Optional message from the graph store upsert operation

response_id.description: ID of the response, this gets populated from request_id

vector_store_message.description: Optional message from the vector store upsert operation

agent_id.description: ID that represents the agent, optional for query operations

additional_context.description: AdditionalContext provides optional contextual information to refine query execution. This may include prior conversation state, structured hints, or domain-specific metadata. The contents are treated as opaque by the API and interpreted by downstream components. Each element must be a structured object

header.description: Header(s) of the request, required (must include agent_id)

intent.description: User intent or natural-language query describing what information is being requested. This field is required and is the primary signal used to construct and execute the query

request_id.description: ID of the request, optional. If not provided, a random UUID is used to represent the request

search_strategy.description: Search strategy to be used when executing the query. Currently supported values: "semantic_graph_traversal". If not specified, defaults to "semantic_graph_traversal"

message.description: Message provides detailed information from the query result

response_id.description: ID of the response, this gets populated from request_id
